response.justification: Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience, substantially exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Demonstrates strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js expertise, clear architectural thinking, and active work on AI agent infrastructure (MCP frameworks), which is a specified but uncommon required skill. Primary gaps are lack of explicit detail on specific modern stack tools (Nest.js, Vitest, Jest) and demonstrated breadth across multiple cloud platforms beyond AWS.
strengths: Exceeds seniority requirement by 9+ years with consistent Staff and Senior roles, including current Staff position at re:cinq
Currently develops AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly addressing a required but specialized skill
Proven full-stack mastery with TypeScript and Node.js across complex systems including high-scale transaction platforms and distributed GIS infrastructure
concerns: Nest.js and specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly mentioned despite being primary tech stack
Cloud platform experience demonstrated only with AWS CDK; GCP and Azure not mentioned despite job requirement for multiple platforms
No explicit demonstration of authentication, authorization, or security best-practices implementation despite being a required skill

key_factors.factor: Modern framework and testing tool specificity
